titleStmt.title: SII 38.269: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 269. (A.R. No. 269 of 1912.) NATTAM, MADURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a pillar lying infront of the Śeṇbagēśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning lost and incomplete. It records an order issued by the consort (uḍaiyapirāṭṭiyār) of Śrī Vīrakōsamaṅgalam-uḍaiyār, to reclaim all the fallow lands earmarked for the maintenance of the temple kitchen (tirumaḍaippaḷḷippuṟam) and utilize the yield of such lands for conducting festivals every year, on the occasion of summer and winter solstices, aippasi-vishu, chittirai-vishu eclipse and for conducting other rituals on the day of Māśi-magam, for the merit and welfare of the queen Dantipirāṭṭiyār and king Śrī Rājēndrachōḷa. It is further stated that the member of the ūr-vāriyam committee was to supervise the cultivation of lands and conduct the festivals, with the produce of the reclaimed land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yarāka śrīvirakocamaṅkalamuṭaiyār Uṭai
ya pirāṭṭiyār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippu
ṟamāṉa Ikkoṭṭattūrkaḷaik ko
(ma)ṇṭu tiruttuviccu tantippirāṭṭiyārkkum
śrīrājentra(r)coḻatevarkkum Epperppa
ṭṭa Ariṣṭaṅkaḷuṅ keṭṭu Abhyudeyamāka
veṇṭumeṉṟu Iṉṉilamāṭṭāṇṭu toṟu
m Ūrvāriyam ceyvāṉ kuṭukkaṭuttup payireṟ
ṟu viccu viḷain=ta bhogaṅkūṭṭi Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Uttira
mayanasaṅkrayamu ndakṣiṇamayanasaṅkramum Aippaciviṣu
vum cittiraiviṣuvum naṭuvupaṭṭa graṇaṅkaḷukkum ceyyu
m snapanadravyaṅkaḷ nūṟṟeṭṭukalacattukku veṇṭuvaṉa
kuṟaivākāmaik kkoṇṭu Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum snapana
ñ ceyvittu mācimakattukku muṉ tirukkoṭiyeṟṟi E
ḻunāḷum baliyiṭṭut tiruviḻā Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum po
ttuvittu Ittiruviḻāc cuṭṭi van=ta Aḻiyum Ivvā
riyañ ceyvāre Aḻittu mācimakat tirunāḷ pañcamu
ruttiye tirttamāṭi Iccuṭṭapaṭṭa snapanaṅkaḷukku A
tukkaṇik
Digital edition of SII 38.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
